Metadata.title: Eauxle — Olfactory Deduction
Metadata.description: A daily fragrance guessing game. Deduce the mystery perfume from evolving clues.
Metadata.signInDescription: Sign in to your Eauxle account

input.closed: Come back tomorrow for new essence...

Header.signedOutGlobalSuccess: Successfully signed out from all devices

Footer.slogan: Train your nose, one day at a time...

GameActions.rateLimitError: Too many requests — please wait 1 minute before trying again.

HelpModal.title: How to Play
HelpModal.description: Every day, a new perfume is selected. You have 6 attempts to guess it based on evolving clues.
HelpModal.cluesDesc: The image clears up, fragrance notes are revealed, and the brand, year, perfumer, and gender progressively unlock.
HelpModal.feedbackDesc: tell you how close you are.
HelpModal.scoreDesc: Fewer guesses = higher score. Rare fragrances carry a difficulty bonus.
HelpModal.doubleEnter: Press Enter twice to quickly select the first suggestion from the list.
HelpModal.note: A new perfume is released every day at midnight.

ResetButton.tooltip: Give up and reset your progress
ResetButton.question: Reset the game?

RevealImage.titleTooltip: Bottle photo. Initially heavily blurred, it becomes clearer with each subsequent attempt. The full image is revealed at the end of the game.

PyramidClues.olfactoryProfileTooltip: Attempt 1: Note count and word lengths hidden. Attempt 2: Note count and word lengths revealed. Attempts 3 & 4: Some notes are revealed. Attempt 5+: All notes fully visible.
PyramidClues.pyramidTooltip: Attempt 1: Note count and word lengths hidden. Attempt 2: Note count and word lengths revealed. Attempts 3 & 4: Some levels are revealed. Attempt 5+: All notes fully visible.
PyramidClues.linearProfileTooltip: In the 1st attempt, the total number of masked notes is hidden
PyramidClues.linearMeaning: Linear profile — there is no classic top, heart, and base division. Individual notes are gradually revealed with each attempt.
PyramidClues.hiddenNotes: Number and length of notes hidden in attempt {attempt}

MetaClues.titleTooltip: Key details: brand, perfumer, release year, and gender. Letters and digits for brand, perfumer, and year are progressively unmasked with each subsequent attempt. Gender remains fully hidden until attempt 5.
MetaClues.genderHiddenUntil: Revealed after attempt 4 or when a guessed perfume shares the same gender

AttemptLog.title: Investigation Log
AttemptLog.titleTooltip: History of your attempts. The icons and their colors indicate how close your guesses were regarding the actual brand, perfumer, year, gender, and notes.

tooltips.yearCloseHigher: Year: Close. Try a newer year (1-3 years)
tooltips.yearCloseLower: Year: Close. Try an older year (1-3 years)
tooltips.yearWrongHigher: Year: Incorrect. Try a newer year
tooltips.yearWrongLower: Year: Incorrect. Try an older year

login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Enter your credentials to sign in

register.title: Create an Account
register.description: Enter your email below to create your account
register.successDescription: Please check your email to confirm your account.
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.captchaDescription: Please verify you are human to start the game.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email, we have sent password reset instructions.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.description: Please enter your new password below
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in.

errorWatcher.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during login.
errorWatcher.problemSigningIn: There was a problem signing you in.

passwordStrength.commonWarning: This password is in the top 100 most common passwords list.

Sessions.title: Active Sessions
Sessions.description: Manage your active sessions and devices.
Sessions.anonymousDescription: You are playing as a guest. Your session is local.
Sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out from all devices?
Sessions.anonymousHistory: Anonymous players do not have session history.

Migration.title: Anonymous Session Detected
Migration.description: We found anonymous game history on this device. Do you want to attach it to your account? It will be merged with your current history (game results on your account take priority).
Migration.warning: Important: Choosing 'Skip' means permanently abandoning your anonymous results. Only the history from your account will be loaded.
Migration.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to abandon your anonymous history? This action cannot be undone.
Migration.exitConfirm: Do you want to abort? You will be logged out and returned to your saved anonymous game progress.
Migration.abortHelp: You can close this window (X) to abort login and return to anonymous play without losing data.
Migration.error: Failed to merge progress. Please try again.
